# HYPERANK — FULL VISUAL & UX REDESIGN PROMPT FOR CURSOR
# Use Claude Sonnet (claude-sonnet-4-5 or latest) as the AI inside Cursor.
# This prompt is self-contained. Read every section before writing a single line of code.

---

## FIRST: WHAT'S WRONG WITH THE CURRENT SITE

Here is an honest audit. Use it as a list of everything to fix:

- **It looks like a default shadcn install.** White cards, grey text, standard padding, zero personality. It could be a weather app or a todo list. Nothing says "internet culture platform."
- **The hero does nothing.** "What's hot. What's not." is fine copy but it sits on a blank dark background with no visual interest, no motion, nothing to look at.
- **Trend cards are boring.** Just text + two emoji buttons. The heat bar, vote velocity indicator, and visual feedback that make this feel alive are missing.
- **The stats in the hero are fake.** "∞ votes cast" and "— your streak" are placeholder values that make the site look broken and unfinished.
- **No visual hierarchy on the homepage.** Everything is the same weight. Daily drop, trending, auditions, battles — they all feel like the same flat section stacked vertically.
- **The battle section is a single link card.** It should be a live, animated split-screen that pulls people in.
- **No personality in empty states.** "No auditions yet" with nothing around it looks abandoned.
- **The nav is plain.** No logo treatment, no visual identity, just text links.
- **Mobile bottom nav exists** but the overall mobile experience feels like a desktop site squished down.
- **No sense of a game.** There's no score, no visible streak reward, no credit counter in the nav, nothing that makes you feel like you're playing something.
- **The shop exists but nothing draws you toward it.** No teaser, no urgency, no reason to click.
- **Font is generic.** Looks like default Inter with no display font giving it character.
- **Zero motion.** Nothing moves. A site about the pulse of culture should feel alive.

## TECH STACK — USE EXACTLY THIS

```bash
# AI inside Cursor: use Claude (claude-sonnet-4-5 or the latest available)
# Set in Cursor settings: Models → Claude Sonnet

# Package installs — run all at once
npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk                    # Claude API for AI features
npm install @21st-dev/magic                       # 21st.dev Magic for component generation
npx shadcn@latest init                            # shadcn/ui — component library
npm install framer-motion                         # animations
npm install @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei three  # 3D avatar rendering
npm install @types/three
npm install recharts                              # charts and sparklines
npm install zustand                               # global state
npm install date-fns                              # date handling
npm install canvas-confetti @types/canvas-confetti
npm install lucide-react                          # icons
npm install clsx tailwind-merge                   # class utilities
npm install @supabase/supabase-js @supabase/auth-helpers-nextjs
npm install isomorphic-dompurify @types/dompurify
npm install bad-words
npm install @vercel/og
npm install resend
npm install @upstash/ratelimit @upstash/redis
npm install vaul                                  # drawer component (mobile sheets)
npm install sonner                                # toast notifications
npm install @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-tooltip @radix-ui/react-tabs
```

**Google Fonts to load in `layout.tsx`:**
```tsx
import { Syne, Inter } from 'next/font/google'

const syne = Syne({
  subsets: ['latin'],
  weight: ['400', '500', '600', '700', '800'],
  variable: '--font-syne',
})

const inter = Inter({
  subsets: ['latin'],
  weight: ['400', '500', '600'],
  variable: '--font-inter',
})
// Apply both to <html> className
```

## DESIGN SYSTEM — DEFINE THIS BEFORE WRITING ANY COMPONENT

### Color Tokens
```css
/* globals.css — these are the only colors used site-wide */
:root {
  /* Backgrounds */
  --bg-void: #07070d;         /* page background — near black, slight purple */
  --bg-surface: #0f0f1a;      /* card surfaces */
  --bg-raised: #16162a;       /* elevated cards, modals */
  --bg-overlay: #1e1e33;      /* tooltips, dropdowns */

  /* Brand */
  --hype: #ff2d6b;            /* hot pink — the "hype" color */
  --hype-glow: rgba(255,45,107,0.25);
  --dead: #3d3d5c;            /* muted — the "dead" color */
  --dead-text: #6b6b8a;

  /* Accents */
  --gold: #f0c040;            /* credits, streaks, leaderboard gold */
  --gold-glow: rgba(240,192,64,0.2);
  --neon: #00e5a0;            /* live indicators, rising pills */
  --neon-glow: rgba(0,229,160,0.2);
  --purple: #7c3aed;          /* secondary accent, battle energy */

  /* Text */
  --text-1: #f2f2ff;          /* primary text */
  --text-2: #9090b0;          /* secondary text */
  --text-3: #5a5a7a;          /* muted / disabled */

  /* Borders */
  --border: #1f1f38;
  --border-bright: #2e2e50;

  /* Rarity colors */
  --common: #9090b0;
  --rare: #3b82f6;
  --epic: #a855f7;
  --legendary: #f0c040;
  --mythic: #ff2d6b;          /* animated gradient for mythic items */
}
```

### Typography Scale
```css
/* Display — Syne, used for hero headlines, section titles, stat numbers */
.text-display-xl { font-family: var(--font-syne); font-size: 4rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: -0.03em; }
.text-display-lg { font-family: var(--font-syne); font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
.text-display-md { font-family: var(--font-syne); font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.15; }
.text-display-sm { font-family: var(--font-syne); font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; }

/* Body — Inter */
.text-body-lg { font-family: var(--font-inter); font-size: 1.0625rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.6; }
.text-body-md { font-family: var(--font-inter); font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.55; }
.text-body-sm { font-family: var(--font-inter); font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; }

/* Labels / Caps */
.text-label { font-family: var(--font-inter); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; }
```

### Signature Design Elements

1. **The Heat Bar** — every trend card has a 4px bar at the very bottom edge. It glows `--hype` color. The glow intensity (blur radius and opacity) is driven by `vote_velocity`. A fast-rising trend pulses and glows brightly. A dead trend's bar is `--dead`, no glow. This is the single most iconic visual element of the whole site.

2. **Glass Cards** — all cards use:
   ```css
   background: var(--bg-surface);
   border: 1px solid var(--border);
   border-radius: 16px;
   /* On hover: */
   border-color: var(--border-bright);
   box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--border-bright), 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
   ```
   No frosted glass effect — this site is dark and solid, not cloudy.

3. **Velocity Pills** — small pill badges that say "Rising" (neon green) or "Cooling" (muted) based on vote direction. Positioned top-right of cards.

4. **Number Pop** — all stat numbers (vote counts, credits, streak) use Syne font, sized large, with a subtle count-up animation on first render.

5. **Live Dot** — a 6px circle that pulses (CSS animation, `--neon` color) next to anything that's live or updating in real time.

---

## THE HOMEPAGE — SECTION BY SECTION

The homepage is the main game screen. Someone landing here for the first time should feel pulled in immediately. Someone returning should see new things to act on. Design it like a dashboard, not a blog.

### Section 1 — HERO

**Full viewport height. Split layout.**

Left side (60% width):
- Small eyebrow label: `LIVE · INTERNET CULTURE` with a pulsing neon dot before it
- H1 in Syne 800: `What's hot.` (line break) `What's not.` — the "hot" is colored `--hype`, the "not" is `--dead-text`
- Subtext (Inter, --text-2): `Vote on what's trending. Earn credits. Build your streak. The internet's pulse, live.`
- Two CTA buttons:
  - Primary: "Start voting" → `/trends` — filled `--hype` background, white text, 48px height, 999px radius
  - Secondary: "See the battles" → `/battles` — transparent, `--border-bright` border, same size
- Below CTAs: three small live stat chips in a row:
  - `🔥 [X] votes today` — pulls real count from DB
  - `⚡ [X] active streaks` — real count
  - `🟢 Live now` — only shows if a battle is active

Right side (40% width, desktop only):
- A floating **Trend Card** (the best-looking trend from today's drop, live data) — slightly rotated (-3deg), glowing, interactive. Clicking it goes to that trend. This shows what the cards look like and doubles as a live demo.
- Behind it: one more card, partially visible, rotated differently — creates depth.
- Subtle radial gradient behind the cards in `--hype-glow` for atmosphere.

Mobile: Stack vertically. Cards hidden on mobile hero, just the text + CTAs + stats.

### Section 2 — DAILY DROP

**Dark background with a contrasting section header.**

Header row:
- Left: `Today's Drop` in `text-display-md`
- Right: countdown pill `Next drop in 14h 22m` — Syne mono, `--gold` color, with a small clock icon. Ticks down in real time (client-side).

Below: **5-card horizontal scroll on mobile, 3-2 grid on desktop.**

Each Daily Drop card is visually distinct from the regular trend cards:
- Slightly taller
- A `TODAY'S DROP` badge in top-left — small, `--gold` background, dark text
- The heat bar at bottom is always bright (daily drops are forced as high-energy)
- After voting: the card flips (CSS 3D transform) to reveal the current result as a big percentage number

### Section 3 — WHAT'S MOVING (Trending Feed)

**Split layout on desktop: feed on left (65%), sidebar on right (35%).**

Left — the feed:
- Filter tabs across the top: `All` / `Rising` / `Cooling` / `Controversial` — tabs styled as pill selectors, `--bg-raised` fill, `--hype` on active
- Infinite scroll of Trend Cards (see Trend Card spec below)
- Every 6th card: an AdSense slot that matches the card dimensions exactly — same border radius, same background, labelled `Ad` in the corner. Never a visual break.

Right sidebar (desktop only, sticky):
- **Your stats box**: streak flame + number, credit count, hype score. If not logged in: "Sign in to track your streak" with a sign-in button.
- **Rising fast**: top 3 trends by vote velocity, shown as a mini leaderboard (rank, name, velocity arrow + number)
- **Live battle teaser**: if a battle is active, show a mini version of the battle card with live vote bar. Click → full battle page.

### Section 4 — LIVE BATTLE ARENA (teaser on homepage)

**Full-width section with a distinct darker background (`--bg-void`) to separate it visually.**

If a battle is live:
- Big section header: `Battle Live Now`
- Full-width battle card (see Battle Card spec)
- "See all battles" link below

If no battle is live:
- Show "Next battle starts [time]" with the two upcoming contestants teased (names visible, vote counts hidden)

### Section 5 — AUDITIONS

If auditions exist: 3-card grid showing top pitches with upvote counts and a "Vote" button on each.
If no auditions: a single wide CTA card: "Nothing here yet. Pitch something." → `/pitches`

### Section 6 — THE SHOP TEASER

A horizontal banner card, full-width:
- Left: `Weekly Drop` badge + drop name + ends-in timer
- Center: 3 silhouetted item shapes (partially revealed, creates curiosity)
- Right: "See the drop" button → `/shop/drop`
- Background: subtle gradient using the drop's theme color

### Section 7 — LEADERBOARD PREVIEW

Top 5 users this week, shown as a ranked list:
- Each row: rank number (Syne, large, muted), small avatar circle, username, streak, hype score, credits
- "Full leaderboard" link

---

## TREND CARD — THE CORE COMPONENT

This card appears everywhere. It must be perfect.

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ [VELOCITY PILL top-right: 🟢 Rising +14/hr] │
│                                              │
│  Rizz                                        │  ← Syne 700, --text-1
│  Gen Z slang for charisma or pickup game.    │  ← Inter, --text-2, 2 lines max
│                                              │
│  ████████████████░░░░░  73%                  │  ← hype bar: --hype fill left, --dead right
│  1,501 votes                                 │  ← --text-3, small
│                                              │
│  [🔥 Hype]              [💀 Dead]            │  ← two buttons, equal width
│                                              │
│══════════════════════════════════════════════│  ← HEAT BAR: 4px, glowing
```

**Heat bar glow CSS:**
```css
.heat-bar {
  height: 4px;
  border-radius: 0 0 16px 16px;
  background: var(--hype);
  /* intensity driven by vote_velocity prop */
  box-shadow: 0 0 calc(var(--velocity) * 2px) calc(var(--velocity) * 1px) var(--hype-glow);
  transition: box-shadow 1s ease;
}
/* If dead/cooling: background: var(--dead); no glow */
```

**Vote button behavior:**
- Before vote: both buttons visible, equal size, outline style
- On hover: scale 1.03, subtle background fill
- On click: spring animation (scale 0.92 → 1.05 → 1.0), immediate optimistic update
- After voting HYPE: Hype button fills `--hype`, Dead button goes muted. Percentage updates live.
- After voting DEAD: Dead button fills `--dead`, Hype button goes muted.
- Never show a loading spinner — optimistic UI only.

**Voted state:**
```
│  [🔥 Hype ✓]           [💀 Dead]            │
│  You voted hype · 73% agree                  │  ← new sub-line, --text-3
```

---

## BATTLE PAGE + BATTLE CARD COMPONENT

The battle page (`/battles/[id]`) is the most visually dramatic page on the site.

**Full screen. Split vertically down the middle.**

Left half (`--hype` tinted background, very subtle — 5% opacity):
- Trend A name in massive Syne 800
- Category label
- Current vote count
- "Vote A" button — fills left half on click

Right half (`--dead`/purple tinted):
- Trend B name
- Category label
- Vote count
- "Vote B" button

Center divider:
- `VS` in Syne 800, slightly overlapping both halves
- A live progress bar that spans the full width, showing the vote split. Animates in real time.
- If user voted: highlight which side they picked

Below the split:
- Timer: "Battle ends in 2h 14m"
- Recent votes: a live feed of "[username] voted for [Trend A]" entries sliding in from bottom (Supabase realtime)
- Hot takes section for this battle

**Battle Card (mini version for homepage):**
```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ⚔️ Battle Live                        2h 14m  │
│                                                 │
│  Rizz           ██████████░░░░░░  Girl Dinner   │
│  61%            [──────────────]  39%            │
│                                                 │
│  [Vote Rizz]                  [Vote Girl Dinner] │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```
The progress bar animates. The numbers update via Supabase realtime. Everything is live.

---

## NAVIGATION

**Desktop navbar (fixed top, full width):**
```
[HR logo]   Trends   Battles   Ranks   Shop        [🔥 5 streak] [⚡ 240] [avatar circle]
```
- Logo: `HR` in a small square with `--hype` background + `HypeRank` wordmark in Syne next to it
- Nav links: Inter 500, --text-2, active = --text-1 with a 2px `--hype` underline
- Right side when logged in: streak chip (🔥 + number, `--gold`), credits chip (⚡ + number), avatar circle (24px, clickable → dashboard)
- Right side when logged out: `Sign in` button — outline style
- Background: `--bg-void` with `border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border)`. On scroll: slight blur backdrop.

**Mobile bottom nav (fixed, 5 tabs):**
```
[Home] [Vote] [Pitch] [Battles] [You]
```
- Icons from Lucide React
- Active tab: icon + label in `--hype`, others in `--text-3`
- Badge dot on "Battles" if a live battle exists
- Badge dot on "You" if daily streak not yet maintained

## LOCKER PAGE (`/locker`)

The locker is where users dress their character. It should feel like opening a game's cosmetics screen.

**Layout (desktop):**
Left panel (40%):
- 3D avatar rendered with React Three Fiber — full body, softly lit, slowly auto-rotating
- Character name below
- "Equipped" badge count

Right panel (60%):
- Category tab bar: `All` / `Hats` / `Shirts` / `Pants` / `Shoes` / `Accessories` / `Backgrounds` / `Effects`
- Grid of cosmetic item cards (4 columns desktop, 2 mobile)
- Each item card:
  - Item preview image or 3D thumbnail
  - Item name
  - Rarity pill (color matches rarity token)
  - If owned + equipped: `Equipped` badge, green border
  - If owned: `Equip` button
  - If locked by streak: `🔥 7-day streak` — clicking shows progress toward unlock
  - If purchasable: credit price + `Buy` button (deducts credits, immediately unlocks)
  - If sold out / limited: `Gone` stamp
- "Save" button at bottom — saves equipped config to DB

**Mobile:** Avatar at top (shorter), items in 2-column grid below. Sticky save button at screen bottom.

---

## SHOP / DROP PAGE (`/shop/drop`)

**Hero banner full width:**
- Drop name + theme (large Syne display)
- Drop ends timer (live countdown)
- Drop banner image as background

**Item grid below:**
- 3-column desktop, 2-column mobile
- Each item card:
  - Short looping video preview (10 seconds, autoplay muted loop)
  - Item name + rarity pill
  - `X left` supply indicator — turns `--hype` when under 20%
  - Credit price
  - `Buy` button → confirm modal
  - If sold out: full card overlay with `SOLD OUT` in Syne 800, semi-transparent
  - Serial number for legendary/mythic: `#2 of 5` in gold

**Confirm modal:**
- Shows item preview, price, your current credit balance, estimated serial number
- `Confirm purchase` → atomic DB transaction → success state with confetti

---

## MARKETPLACE (`/shop/market`)

Think of a sneaker marketplace but for cosmetic items. Clean. Sorted by price.

**Filters bar (sticky):**
Rarity filter (pills) | Category filter | Price range slider | Sort dropdown

**Listings grid:**
Each card shows:
- Item preview image
- Rarity pill
- Serial (if legendary/mythic)
- Seller avatar + username (small)
- Asking price (Syne, prominent)
- Floor price badge (smaller, `--text-3`)
- Mini sparkline of last 10 sale prices (Recharts)
- `Buy` button

**Item detail page (`/shop/market/[cosmeticId]`):**
- 3D rotating item preview (React Three Fiber, just the item, no avatar)
- Full price history chart (Recharts line chart)
- All active listings in a table: seller, price, serial, buy button
- Stats: total supply, owners, floor price, last sale
- `Add to wishlist` heart button

---

## PROFILE PAGE (`/u/[username]`)

**Full-page hero:**
- Background: the user's equipped background cosmetic (full bleed)
- Center: 3D avatar, full body, OrbitControls enabled (visitor can spin it)
- Overlaid on avatar bottom: username, display name, `@` handle
- Top right: `Share` button + privacy badge if private

**Stats row below hero:**
Four stat chips in a row: `🔥 Streak: 14` / `⚡ Credits: 840` / `🎯 Accuracy: 71%` / `🗳️ Votes: 342`

**Badges row:**
Horizontal scrollable badge grid. Each badge: icon, name, rarity glow, tooltip on hover with unlock description.

**Social links row:**
Platform icon buttons (Twitter, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitch) — filled if verified, outline if not linked.

**Tabs:**
`Votes` / `Predictions` / `Hot Takes` / `Submitted`
Each tab shows paginated activity feed.

---

## LEADERBOARD (`/leaderboard`)

**Four tabs:** Top Voters / Trend Prophets / Credit Kings / Streak Legends

**Each row:**
- Rank number (Syne, large, `--text-3`, gold/silver/bronze for top 3)
- Avatar (small circle, 32px)
- Username + most prominent badge
- Key stat for that leaderboard (votes / accuracy % / credits / streak days)
- Sparkline of their activity this week

Top 3 rows get a subtle background glow matching gold/silver/bronze.

---

## DASHBOARD (`/dashboard`)

The user's personal home base. Shows everything they care about.

**Layout — two columns desktop:**

Left:
- Streak card: big flame animation, streak count in massive Syne, "Vote today to keep it going" or "✓ Done for today"
- Predictions tab: active predictions with time remaining, resolved ones with win/loss result
- Recent activity feed

Right:
- Credit balance (big number) + transaction history
- Active trade offers (accept/reject inline)
- Wishlist: items on wishlist that are now available in marketplace
- Your listings: active marketplace listings

---

## ANIMATIONS REFERENCE — USE FRAMER MOTION

All motion should feel physical, not random. Spring physics over easing curves.

```tsx
// Standard card hover
whileHover={{ scale: 1.02, y: -2 }}
transition={{ type: 'spring', stiffness: 400, damping: 30 }}

// Vote button click
whileTap={{ scale: 0.92 }}
// Follow with a spring back:
animate={{ scale: [0.92, 1.06, 1.0] }}
transition={{ type: 'spring', stiffness: 500, damping: 20 }}

// Section entrance (staggered children)
initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] }}

// Battle progress bar
// Animate width with spring — makes it feel like it's pulling
transition={{ type: 'spring', stiffness: 120, damping: 20 }}

// Heat bar pulse (CSS, not Framer — runs continuously)
@keyframes heat-pulse {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
  50% { opacity: 0.6; }
}
// Duration is inversely proportional to vote_velocity
// Fast velocity = fast pulse. Dead = no pulse.

// Number count-up on render
// Use a simple useEffect with requestAnimationFrame to count from 0 to value over 600ms

// Confetti on streak milestones and purchases
import confetti from 'canvas-confetti'
confetti({ particleCount: 80, spread: 60, colors: ['#ff2d6b', '#f0c040', '#00e5a0'], origin: { y: 0.6 } })

// Toast notifications — use Sonner
import { toast } from 'sonner'
toast.success('Vote counted.')
toast.error('Something went wrong.')
toast('Your listing sold. Credits added.')
```

**Motion rules:**
- Page transitions: 300ms fade + 16px slide up. Consistent across all pages.
- Modals: scale from 0.96 + fade in. Backdrop blurs in simultaneously.
- No bouncing logos, no spinning loaders, no celebration animations for basic actions.
- Confetti only for streak milestones (3, 7, 14, 30 days) and first-time mythic/legendary purchases.
- Reduced motion: wrap all Framer animations in `useReducedMotion()` check.

---

## SHADCN COMPONENTS — USE THESE, CUSTOMIZE THEM

These shadcn components form the UI base. Reskin every one to match the design tokens above — do not use their default styling:

```
Button         → restyle with --hype fill (primary), outline (secondary), ghost (tertiary)
Card           → restyle with --bg-surface + --border
Badge          → restyle per rarity color
Dialog         → modal with --bg-raised background, blur backdrop
Sheet          → drawer for mobile panels (use vaul for better mobile feel)
Tabs           → pill style tabs, --hype active state
Tooltip        → dark tooltip matching --bg-overlay
Avatar         → circular, border in --border-bright
Progress       → restyle for hype/dead split bar
Slider         → for credit wager in prediction modal
Separator      → use --border color
```

**Do not use:**
- `Alert` component (write inline error states instead)
- `Table` (write custom table markup)
- `Accordion` (write custom)
- Any default shadcn color tokens — override all with the design system above

---

## EMPTY STATES — EVERY ONE, DESIGNED

Never show a blank space. Every empty state has a clear action attached.

```
No auditions:    "Nothing here yet. Be the first to pitch something."  [Pitch an idea →]
No hot takes:    "Nothing posted yet. Say something."                  [Post a take →]
No inventory:    "Your locker is empty. Check the weekly drop."        [Go to Shop →]
No wishlist:     "Nothing saved. Add items from the marketplace."      [Browse →]
No predictions:  "No active predictions. Pick a trend and call it."    [Trends →]
No streak:       "No streak yet. Vote once to start."                  [Vote now →]
No battles:      "Nothing live right now. Check back later."           (no CTA needed)
Profile private: "This profile is private."                            (no CTA)
Sold out item:   "Sold out. Find it on the marketplace."               [Marketplace →]
```

Style: centered, `--text-2` color, Inter 400, no emoji, no exclamation points.

---

## NOTIFICATION / TOAST SYSTEM

Use `sonner` for all toasts. Position: bottom-right desktop, bottom-center mobile.

```tsx
// Sonner setup in layout.tsx
import { Toaster } from 'sonner'
<Toaster
  position="bottom-right"
  toastOptions={{
    style: {
      background: 'var(--bg-raised)',
      border: '1px solid var(--border-bright)',
      color: 'var(--text-1)',
      fontFamily: 'var(--font-inter)',
      fontSize: '0.875rem',
    }
  }}
/>

// Toast messages:
toast.success('Vote counted.')
toast.success('Credits added.')
toast('Streak saved.')
toast.success('Item purchased.')  // + confetti if legendary/mythic
toast('Trade offer sent.')
toast('Your listing sold.')
toast.error('Something went wrong. Try again.')
toast.error('Not enough credits.')
toast('Already voted on this one.')
```

---

## RESPONSIVENESS RULES

Mobile breakpoint: 768px. Design mobile-first.

- Cards: full width on mobile, never less than 300px
- Hero: stacked on mobile, side-by-side on desktop (min 1024px)
- Nav: top bar on desktop, bottom tab bar on mobile
- Locker: avatar stacked above items on mobile
- Battle page: stacked vertically on mobile with A on top, B below, VS between
- Leaderboard rows: hide sparklines on mobile
- Shop grid: 2 columns mobile, 3 desktop, 4 on wide screens
- Marketplace: 2 columns mobile, 3 desktop
- All touch targets minimum 44px × 44px

---

## PAGE TITLES AND META (generateMetadata)

Every page needs these. Use the pattern:

```tsx
// /trends
title: 'Trends | HypeRank'
description: 'Vote on what\'s hype and what\'s dead. Real-time internet culture rankings.'

// /trends/[slug]
title: `Is ${trend.name} hype or dead? | HypeRank`
description: `${trend.hype_votes} say hype, ${trend.dead_votes} say dead. Vote now.`
og:image: `/api/og/trend/${slug}`  ← dynamic OG image via @vercel/og

// /battles
title: 'Battles | HypeRank'
description: 'Head-to-head trend battles. Vote for your side.'

// /u/[username]
title: `${profile.username} on HypeRank`
description: `${profile.streak_days}-day streak · ${profile.hype_score}% accuracy`
og:image: `/api/og/profile/${username}`

// /shop/drop
title: 'Weekly Drop | HypeRank Shop'
description: 'Limited items. Once they\'re gone, they\'re gone.'

// /leaderboard
title: 'Leaderboard | HypeRank'
description: 'The top voters, predictors, and streak holders on HypeRank.'
```

---

## OG IMAGE TEMPLATES (via @vercel/og)

### Trend OG (`/api/og/trend/[slug]`)
```
Dark background (#07070d)
Top-left: HypeRank logo (HR mark + wordmark)
Center: Trend name in Syne 800, large
Below: hype % in --hype color | vote count
Bottom bar: heat bar spanning full width, glowing
Bottom-right: "hyperank.ca"
```

### Profile OG (`/api/og/profile/[username]`)
```
Dark background
Left: avatar snapshot (static frame from GLB render — use a pre-generated PNG stored in Supabase)
Right: username (Syne 700), streak, accuracy %, credits, top badge
Bottom: "hyperank.ca/u/[username]"
```

### Weekly Report OG (`/api/og/report/[week]`)
```
Dark background with subtle gradient
"WEEK IN HYPE" header
Three columns: Biggest Riser / Most Dead / Best Call
Hosted at hyperank.ca/report/[week]
```

---

## CRITICAL QUALITY RULES

- **Zero placeholder data on live site.** If the stat isn't loaded yet, show a skeleton. Never show "—" or "∞" as a real value.
- **Skeletons everywhere.** Match the shape of the real content exactly. Use `animate-pulse` on a `--bg-raised` block.
- **No console errors on production build.** Run `next build` and fix all warnings.
- **All images have `alt` text.**
- **All interactive elements have `aria-label` where text isn't visible.**
- **Dark mode is the only mode.** No light mode toggle. The design tokens are dark-mode-only.
- **Font loading: use `display: swap`.** No invisible text while fonts load.
- **All Framer Motion wrapped in `<AnimatePresence>` where elements mount/unmount.**
- **Optimistic UI on votes.** Never wait for the server response to update the vote count. Roll back on error + show toast.
- **Supabase realtime on:** homepage feed, battle pages, trend detail pages.

---

## BUILD ORDER

Do these in exact order. Don't skip ahead.

1. **Design tokens** — set up `globals.css` with all color/font variables
2. **Layout shell** — navbar (desktop) + bottom nav (mobile) + footer + Sonner toaster
3. **Component library** — reskin all shadcn components to match design tokens
4. **Trend Card component** — the most important component. Build it perfectly before anything else.
5. **Homepage** — all 7 sections, wired to real Supabase data
6. **Trends page** — feed + filters + sidebar
7. **Trend detail page** — vote, predict, hot takes, history chart, OG image
8. **Battle page** — full-screen split, live vote bar, realtime updates
9. **Leaderboard page** — four tabs, real data
10. **Shop drop page** — item grid, purchase flow, atomic RPC
11. **Marketplace** — listings, buy flow, item detail
12. **Locker** — 3D avatar preview + cosmetic grid + equip/purchase
13. **Profile page** — 3D hero, stats, tabs
14. **Dashboard** — streak, predictions, trades, credits
15. **Legal pages** — terms, privacy, cookies, etc. (keep these clean and readable)
16. **OG image routes** — all three templates
17. **Final pass** — audit every empty state, every loading state, every error state. Fix all of them.

---

## FINAL NOTE

This site should look and feel like it was designed by a small team that cares — not generated. Every card, every transition, every piece of copy should feel like someone made a decision about it. The goal is that someone lands on hyperank.ca and within 5 seconds thinks "okay this is actually well made" and starts clicking around.

The bar: if it looks like it could have been built with a generic AI UI kit without any customization, keep going. The heat bar on every card, the Syne display font, the `--hype` pink, and the live battle split screen are the things that make this site itself. Everything else serves those.

---
